resources.string: Shake-powered flashlight control, organized into simple menus.
Grant camera permission, then open Torch to start.
Ready. Open Torch, tap Start Shake Torch, and shake the phone firmly to toggle the flashlight.
Shake Torch is running. Shake the phone firmly to toggle the flashlight.
Camera permission is required to control the flashlight.
No flashlight was found on this device.
Shake the phone firmly to toggle the flashlight.
The app icon will be removed from the launcher only. To get it back, dial %1$s, or tap the Shake Torch notification while the service is running.
Launcher icon hidden. To restore it, dial %1$s or tap the Shake Torch notification while it is running.
Recovery: dial *#*#62442#*#* or tap the running Shake Torch notification.
Start the background shake listener when you need hands-free light control. Stop it any time from here.
Keep the launcher tidy by hiding the app icon. The recovery code and running notification can bring it back.
Keep the service notification enabled. After starting, leave the phone screen on or off and shake firmly to toggle the flashlight.
Tip: If shaking does not toggle the light, make sure camera permission is allowed and your device has a flash.
